overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity depicting the protagonist walking through 18th-century Paris. The character moves from a bustling city square with a fountain, through the gates of Palais Royal, across a courtyard, and into an inner courtyard via a columned gateway. The scene features dense crowds of NPCs in period clothing and classical European stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city square with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone square past groups of pedestrians in 18th-century attire

group of townspeople conversing near the gate entrance

historic European buildings with tall windows and stone facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit historic square with an ornate stone fountain to the left. Groups of NPCs in period clothing populate the cobblestone plaza as the character approaches the wrought iron gates of the palace ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone gateway entrance to palace complex

events.description: passing through the wrought iron gate into the palace courtyard

agents.ego_description: passing through the threshold of the iron gate into the palace courtyard

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat and tricorn hat exiting the courtyard through the gate

entered.detail: white marble statue on pedestal in the courtyard center
symmetrical stone buildings flanking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the gate into a transitional space where light filters through the stone archway. A classical marble statue becomes visible in the courtyard ahead as the fountain and gate recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace courtyard with classical statue and gardens

events.description: entering the open courtyard with the Palais Royal facade ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the open courtyard toward the main palace facade

entered.detail: grand stone building with columns and Palais Royal signage above the entrance
large decorative stone urns lining the courtyard path

segments.scene_description: Moving through the sunlit courtyard, the character passes the marble statue on the left and approaches the imposing Palais Royal facade ahead. Stone urns line the path as the building's columned entrance grows larger.

events.description: entering the shadowed columned gateway, light drops significantly
passing between uniformed guards into the inner passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed columned gateway flanked by guards

notable_agents.action: uniformed guard in blue coat with red sash and tricorn hat standing at attention
uniformed guard in blue coat with red sash and tricorn hat standing at attention

entered.detail: monumental gateway with tall stone columns and iron gates
shadowed corridor leading through the building structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark columned gateway where sunlight fades to shadow. Two uniformed guards stand at attention flanking the entrance as the character moves through the stone passage toward the bright courtyard visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner palace courtyard with classical architecture

events.description: emerging from the dark gateway into the bright inner courtyard

agents.ego_description: emerging into the bright inner courtyard and continuing forward among the crowd

entered.detail: open cobblestone courtyard surrounded by classical buildings
grand building with columns at the far end of the inner courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadowed passage into brilliant sunlight, the character enters the inner courtyard. The space opens up to reveal a grand classical building ahead while crowds of pedestrians move through the cobblestone plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling public square through the gated thresholds of the Palais Royal into a secluded inner courtyard. It begins in a sunlit historic plaza, moving past an ornate stone fountain and crowds of period NPCs toward a set of wrought iron gates. As the character passes through the gate, the scene shifts into a transitional space where light filters through a stone archway, revealing a classical marble statue and stone urns that line the path toward the imposing palace facade. The camera then follows the character into the deep shadows of a columned gateway flanked by uniformed guards, momentarily obscuring the light. Finally, the view emerges from the dark passage into brilliant sunlight, opening up into a grand inner courtyard filled with pedestrians and classical architecture.
